anthony edwards.detail: Played 40 minutes, scored 30 points with 10 rebounds in Game 2 win; knee issue noted but did not affect availability
anthony edwards.web_narrative: Edwards played full minutes and scored 30 points despite a known runner's knee issue. His 2 assists fell short of the 4.5 assist prop, driven by a scoring-focused role rather than any injury exit or restriction — no source explains the low assist total beyond normal game flow.

brandon ingram.detail: Played 36 minutes, shot 3-15 FG for 7 points in a Game 2 loss
brandon ingram.web_narrative: Ingram shot just 3-for-15 from the field in 36 full minutes, missing the points prop due to cold shooting rather than any injury or early exit. No sources indicate a health issue affected this game.
